text: {"reason": "The draft asserts that settlement timing \"depends on official confirmation\" and is \"affected by things like overtime or a review\" \u2014 these are independent assertions about how Novig's settlement process works that are not on the allowed-facts list. The draft should not reference settlement rules, timelines, or conditions unless explicitly listed. The correct approach is to simply say a human will follow up without explaining the underlying settlement mechanics.", "violates": true}
